rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST BLOCKED

The test could not be run — the test requires setting the browser viewport to a mobile size (375x812) to verify mobile-responsive behaviour, but the available browser actions do not provide a way to change the viewport or emulate a mobile device.

Observations:
- No action or capability was available in this test environment to change the browser viewport or enable device emulation; mobile-specific layout checks therefore cannot be performed.
- The Payroll day editor and Late (min) and OT (hrs) numeric inputs are visible in the current desktop viewport (Daily History list and Monthly Allowances exist), but mobile readability/stacking/layout were not verifiable.
